hunger-of-hadar.canonicalEvidence: You open a gateway to the Far Realm, a region infested with unspeakable horrors.
hunger-of-hadar.jsonState: Runtime JSON does not encode a message or communication mechanic.
hunger-of-hadar.issue: The Far Realm gateway flavor is descriptive presentation, not a communication runtime mechanic.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedTemplateChange: No message/communication field required for this row.

hunger-of-hadar.canonicalEvidence: Creatures fully within it have the Blinded condition.
hunger-of-hadar.jsonState: Runtime JSON now has a Blinded status effect, but cannot express fully-within-only area membership.
hunger-of-hadar.issue: The Blinded condition is represented, but its precise fully-within gating is not.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedTemplateChange: Add areaMembership condition fields such as fully_within_area.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime condition areaMembership=fully_within for Blinded.

hunger-of-hadar.canonicalEvidence: A 20-foot-radius Sphere of Darkness appears ... No light, magical or otherwise, can illuminate the area.
hunger-of-hadar.jsonState: Runtime JSON does not encode darkness/no-light environmental state.
hunger-of-hadar.issue: The area creates a darkness environment that suppresses all light, but runtime only represents terrain, blind, and damage.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental darkness and illumination suppression fields.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for darkness and no magical/nonmagical illumination.

hunger-of-hadar.canonicalEvidence: Any creature that starts its turn in the area takes 2d6 Cold damage. Any creature that ends its turn there must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d6 Acid damage.
hunger-of-hadar.structuredState: Effect Type includes DAMAGE; Save Outcome now records none for the save-gated Acid leg.
hunger-of-hadar.jsonState: Runtime JSON now splits start-turn Cold damage from end-turn Dexterity-save Acid damage.
hunger-of-hadar.issue: The start-turn and end-turn damage sequencing is now represented as separate runtime effects.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional recurring timing field required for this row.
hunger-of-hadar.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by splitting the flattened immediate Cold/Acid damage into turn_start Cold and turn_end Acid effects.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: Each creature in the area who can see the pattern must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration.
hypnotic-pattern.structuredState: Save Stat: Wisdom; Save Outcome: negates.
hypnotic-pattern.jsonState: Runtime status effects use a Wisdom save with saveEffect negates_condition.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: The initial Wisdom save gate is represented; visibility and break conditions are tracked separately.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: No save-field change required for this row.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: No save-condition runtime change required for this row.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: Each creature in the area who can see the pattern must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw.
hypnotic-pattern.structuredState: Line of Sight: true only covers caster targeting, not target visibility to the pattern.
hypnotic-pattern.jsonState: Runtime targeting lineOfSight is true, but no per-target can-see-pattern condition exists.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: Hypnotic Pattern requires affected creatures to see the pattern, which is different from caster line of sight.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visibility condition fields for targets seeing an effect/source.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime condition requiresCanSeeEffect for the pattern.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: Each creature in the area who can see the pattern must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration.
hypnotic-pattern.jsonState: Runtime JSON applies Charmed on failed Wisdom save.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: The social-condition part of this row is represented as Charmed; movement/status riders are tracked separately.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: No social-condition field change required for this row.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by preserving the Charmed status effect and removing noncanonical repeat/escape defaults.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: While Charmed, the creature has the Incapacitated condition and a Speed of 0.
hypnotic-pattern.structuredState: Conditions Applied include Charmed and Incapacitated; no speed-0 condition field.
hypnotic-pattern.jsonState: Runtime JSON applies Charmed and Incapacitated, but does not encode Speed 0 or the dependency of Incapacitated/Speed 0 on Charmed.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: Hypnotic Pattern's Charmed and Incapacitated statuses are represented, but Speed 0 and dependent rider semantics are not.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status-rider movement override fields and dependent-status relationship fields.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementOverride speed 0 while Charmed and requiresStatus Charmed for Incapacitated.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: The spell ends for an affected creature if it takes any damage or if someone else uses an action to shake the creature out of its stupor.
hypnotic-pattern.structuredState: Condition Break Triggers records target_takes_damage and adjacent_creature_action_shakes_awake.
hypnotic-pattern.jsonState: Runtime JSON records target_takes_damage and adjacent_creature_action_shakes_awake in statusCondition.breakTriggers on the affected status payloads.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: Closed: Hypnotic Pattern's per-target break conditions are now represented as condition break triggers rather than spell-wide conditional endings.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: No new template field is required; the existing Condition Break Triggers field is the correct home for these per-target status break rules.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: No JSON shape change is required; runtime statusCondition.breakTriggers already carries the damage and shake-awake break rules.
hypnotic-pattern.closedReason: Hypnotic Pattern now records the canonical damage and external-action shake-awake endings in both structured markdown and runtime JSON. The mechanics are per-target status break triggers, not spell-wide conditionalEndings.

hypnotic-pattern.canonicalEvidence: You create a twisting pattern of colors in a 30-foot Cube within range.
hypnotic-pattern.structuredState: Area Shape and Area Size preserve the cube; color presentation is only prose.
hypnotic-pattern.issue: The twisting colors are descriptive presentation; the mechanical area is represented.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedTemplateChange: No descriptive color field required for this goal.
hypnotic-pattern.recommendedJsonChange: No runtime change required for descriptive color presentation.
